basic_details.job_title: Model Degree College Malkangiri Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in the concerned subjects from any recognized university or institution
qualification.details: Anthropology: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Anthropology from any recognized university or institution. Botany: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Botany from any recognized university or institution. Zoology: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Zoology from any recognized university or institution. Sociology: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Sociology from any recognized university or institution. Odia: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Odia from any recognized university or institution. Physics: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Physics from any recognized university or institution. Chemistry: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Chemistry from any recognized university or institution. Mathematics: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Mathematics from any recognized university or institution. Psychology: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Psychology from any recognized university or institution. English: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in English from any recognized university or institution. Political Science: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Political Science from any recognized university or institution. Education: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in Education from any recognized university or institution. History: Minimum 55% marks secured in post-graduation level in History from any recognized university or institution.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 700/- per class, maximum Rs 35,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Rs 700/- per class, with a maximum salary of Rs 35,000/- per month.

selection_process: Career Assessment Interview Pedagogy Skill Presentation
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Model Degree College, Malkangiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Model Degree College, Malkangiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts at Model Degree College, Malkangiri?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Guest Faculty positions at Model Degree College, Malkangiri is July 5, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must have secured a minimum of 55% marks in their post-graduation in the concerned subjects from a recognized university or institution to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty at Model Degree College, Malkangiri?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Rs 700/- per class, with a maximum monthly salary capped at Rs 35,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty positions across various subjects at Model Degree College, Malkangiri.

faq.question: Q6. What are the different subjects for which Guest Faculty are being recruited?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Guest Faculty in subjects including Anthropology, Botany, Zoology, Economics, Sociology, Odia, Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Psychology, English, Political Science, Education, and History.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Guest Faculty roles?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Career Assessment, an Interview, and a Pedagogy Skill Presentation by the candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Guest Faculty positions at Model Degree College, Malkangiri is strictly online.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions at Model Degree College, Malkangiri are on a contractual basis.
